SEARCH
Package testUtils

Class Results

java.lang.Object
testUtils.Results
public class Results extends Object
A class for storing static variables and methods for displaying the results of test cases

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static char
    check
    A Unicode Checkmark

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    test(boolean value, String name)
    this method returns Strings that show the result of a boolean test in the form
    "-- (name) - (PASSED/FAILED) - [(check/x)]" - with check being replaced with the unicode checkmark, and with the slashes being (if value true)/(if value false)

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • check

      public static char check
      A Unicode Checkmark

  • Method Details

    • test

      public static String test(boolean value, String name)
      this method returns Strings that show the result of a boolean test in the form
      "-- (name) - (PASSED/FAILED) - [(check/x)]" - with check being replaced with the unicode checkmark, and with the slashes being (if value true)/(if value false)
      Parameters:
      value - - the boolean result of the test
      name - - the name of the test as a String
      Returns:
      - returns a String that signifies whether the test passed or not
